verification_instructions: Run the script, verify output video exists and has audio+video streams with subtitles burned in
snapshot_or_generated_files: output_with_subtitles.mp4 is generated but should be committed as the deliverable
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Python 3.9 via pyenv. ffmpeg available at /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg. Noto Sans Bold font available at /usr/share/fonts/google-noto-vf/NotoSans[wght].ttf
contribution_requirements: Commit both the script and the output video to the repository
key_patterns: Single script pipeline: extract audio -> whisper transcription -> generate subtitle file -> render video with black bg + subtitles + original audio
directory_structure: Flat repository with source video file. Script and output will be added at root level.
